title: AN ORDINANCE ESTABLISHING THE HEALTH CARE PROGRAM OF CAUAYAN CITY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
sponsor: HON. BAGNOS R. MAXIMO, JR | Co-sponsor: HON. CYNTHIA G. UY-BALAYAN
objectives: It is the Objective of this Ordinance to fprovide all bona fide households of the City of Cauayan health care program that extends prowsion of health and medical care, and accident and disability benefits to their members. ———— aa mY
target_beneficiaries: The heads of the family as recorded in the City of Cauayan Relief Assistance Monitoring System (RAMS) shall be enrolled as beneficiaries in the program. Their dependents shall also be included in the coverage
whereas: the Philippine Constitution likewise provides that the State shall adopt an integrated and comprehensive approach to health development which shall endeavor to make essential goods, health and other social services available to all the people at affordable cost pursuant to the Republic Act No. 7160, otherwise known as the “Local Government Code of 1991”, every local government until shall exercise the powers expressly granted, those necessarily implied therefrom, as well as powers necessary, appropriate or incidental for its efficient and effective governance and those which are essential to the promotion of the general welfare, ensuring and supporting, among other things, the promotion of health and Safety the same Code provides that the Sangguniang Panlungsod shail enact ordinances, approve resolutions and appropriate funds for the general welfare of the city and its inhabitants City Government of Cauayan is committed to the delivery of efficient and quality basic services and facilities, as well as the promotion of the general welfare of it constituents the low-income households and disadvantaged sectors are most vulnerable to risks, such as illness, physical injury, accident, death, and loss of property. In most cases, they are not financially prepared to cope with the risks since they have inadequate or, at worst, have no access to risk protection services driven by the commitment to promote health and maintenance, the City Government of Cauayan intends to extend social protection to low-income households and disadvantaged sectors by establishing a health care program that meets the needs of the disadvantaged for risk protection and relief against distress or misfortune, a powerful tool that gives the disadvantaged sectors access to social protection which include provision of health and medical care, and accident and disability benefits
section: TITLE. This Ordinance shall be known as the “HEALTH CARE PROGRAM ORDINANCE OF THE CITY OF CAUAYAN, ISABELA.”
effectivity: This Ordinance shall take effect upon its approval and posting or publication
